creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Site A to Z at http://www.freebsd.org/search/index-site.html
is missing a few links which probably should be on there, including links for
FreeBSD 6.3 and 7.0 releases and a couple of platforms.  Also, remove the link
for RFC-1644 now that FreeBSD no longer supports it.  Remove the links for web
server statistics and release usage stats because they are out of date or gone.
Lastly, change the location of the security advisories, as location the link
points to describes itself as the "historic location for FreeBSD security
advisories and patches [...] Current security advisiories and patches are now
located at http://security.FreeBSD.org/"
